phase-summary.outcome: Defined the entitlement boundary policy as server-only enforcement with observe-to-enforce rollout and explicit degraded-mode handling.

file.description: Set entitlement check defaults and cohort overrides.

suggestion.gap: No explicit entitlement-state contract in REQUIREMENTS.xml.
suggestion.proposal: Add normative entitlement state machine and fallback semantics for protected AI features.

next.action: Proceed to 50-04 schema mutation API contract and rollback model.
